content: Kripal Singh Linkedin: http://www.linkedin.com/in/Kripal -singhh/ Email: kripalsingh.work@gmail.com Github: https://github.com/CODEMASTERSTACK Mobile: +91 6397504825 SKILLS Languages : C, C++, Python, Java, SQL, HTML, CSS Tools/Platforms : Tableau, SQL Server Management Studio, Android Studio, MongoDB , Cisco Packet Tracker Soft Skills : Problem -Solving, Team Player, Project Management, Adaptability , Consistent TRAINING Unified Mentor Pvt.Ltd Jun’ 24 – Jul’ 24 Full Stack Developer  Collaborated with a cross -functional team to engineer scalable web applications for real life problem solving.  Developed and deployed 5+ responsive web applications, impro ving performance by 30% using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, focusing on clean UI/UX design and optimizing performance for a better user experience. PROJECTS QuizBuster | HTML, CSS, Javascript, API May’ 24  Architected a responsive web application, QuizBuster, enabling students to practice unit -wise MCQs across various subjects, enhancing their learning and exam preparation experience.  Integrated Google Firebase, reducing data retrieval time by 40% for real -time storage and retrieval of quiz data, including dynamic leaderboards displaying top scorers for each unit, fostering a competitive learning environment. Project Link: https://noteslibrary.com/quizbuster/ Suggest Me Movie | HTML, CSS, JavaScript , API Apr’ 25  Engineered a responsive movie recommendation web application, SuggestMeMovie , using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TMDB API, enabling users to explore trending films, filter by genres, and view detailed movie information including trailers, cast, and streaming providers.  Implemented advanced UI/UX features such as glass morphism design, AOS animations, debounced search functionality, and caching for optimized performance, resulting in an interactive and user -friendly browsing experience across devices . Project Link: https://suggestmemovie.netlify.app/ Business Analytics Dashboard using Power BI | PowerBI Nov’ 23  Developed and fine -tuned an interactive Power BI dashboard to provide actionable insights to analyze sales, marketing, and revenue trends, providing d ata-driven insights for business decision -making.  Executed diverse visualizations (gauge charts, bar graphs, histograms, and maps) to present complex data in a clear and interactive manner.  Designed KPI tracking and dynamic filtering to monitor business performance metrics and highlight percentage increases in key areas. CERTIFICATES SQL Certificate | Infosys Springboard Nov’ 23 Python | Infosys Springboard Nov’ 23 C++ Programming | Saylor Academy April’ 24 Big Data 101 | IBM Feb’ 25 EDUCATION Lovely Professional University Phagwara, Punjab Bachelor of Computer Application (Big Data Analytics) Aug’ 21 – Present CGPA: 8.64 Gyandeep Shiksha Bharti Mathura, Uttar Pradesh Intermediate Mar’ 22 – May’ 23 Percentage: 81%
